domain: Amami pufferfish sand circle (small fish builds large geometric radial-maze structure via simple local fin rules over 7-9 days; emergent macro-pattern from local actions)
specific_mechanism: Local-rule + long iteration produces emergent large-scale geometric structure without global plan.
llm_application: PELRLA: small LLM executes only local-window rules iteratively over many passes; symmetry preservation + ridge decoration + maze perturbation; macroscale structure emerges after ~7-9 passes; multi-pass local-rule only, no future-conditioning, distinct from autoregressive and diffusion.
novelty_claim: Survey LLMs Evolutionary Optimization (2509.08269), Emergent Abilities (2503.05788), LLM Serving (2605.01280) cover related. None retrieve multi-pass local-rule-only small-LLM emergent-structure generation.
